text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's another day, and Shinko Windy looks to be up
to something shifty...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Howdy, partner! Or should I say, prankster? What new tricks are ya gettin' up to today?

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text:
Isn't it obvious? I'm setting up a pitfall! If I make
it where the tree hollow is, someone will definitely
fall in! ♪

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text:
Wha—Air Groove! No, y-you heard it wrong! I'm
not making a pitfall or anything—

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Hahaha! I got you good, didn't I? I was only
jokin'!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Sorry, sorry! ♪ But if you're lookin' to make a
pitfall, don'tcha think it's gotta be a bit bigger?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Oh! And we can fill the hole with a buncha water
balloons! It'd make for a good cushion, and once
they pop...

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text:
The person will get completely soaked! Great
thinking! Let's set it up right—

Hm, very interesting. Do you have any other
ideas?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Well, lemme give it a think... Maybe we could mix
some dye in the water...

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text:
Ack... Taiki, turn around! Air Groove's right
behind you!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
She is not! You seriously tryna pull the same trick
on me? ♪

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Wait, really? You're not... pullin' my tail?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Yes, really. Let's continue this conversation in the student council office. Immediately, you two!
